name: create_entities
description: Create multiple new entities in the knowledge graph. Each entity has a name, a type, and an initial list of observations.

entities.description: Array of { name, entityType, observations } entries to create

name: create_relations
description: Create relations between pairs of entities. Relations should be written in active voice such as 'works_at' or 'authored'.

relations.description: Array of { from, to, relationType } edges to create

name: add_observations
description: Attach new observation strings to an existing entity. Observations are appended; duplicates are deduplicated.

entity_name.description: The name of the entity to add observations to

contents.description: Array of observation strings to append

name: delete_entities
description: Delete entities and all their incident relations from the knowledge graph. The operation is irreversible.

entity_names.description: Array of entity names to delete

name: delete_observations
description: Remove specific observations from an entity while leaving the entity itself and its relations intact.

entity_name.description: The name of the entity to modify

observations.description: Observation strings to remove from the entity

name: read_graph
description: Return the full knowledge graph including every entity and relation. Useful for small graphs and debug tooling.

name: search_nodes
description: Search the knowledge graph for entities whose name, type, or observations match a query string. Returns ranked matches.

query.description: Query string to match against names, types, and observation text

limit.description: Maximum number of entities to return (default 20)

name: open_nodes
description: Open one or more entities by name and return their full records including relations and observations.

name: neighbors
description: Return the immediate neighbors of an entity by traversing relations one hop in the specified direction.

entity_name.description: Name of the entity whose neighbors to return

limit.description: Maximum number of neighbors to return

name: merge_entities
description: Merge two entities into a single entity. Observations are unioned; relations are rewritten to point at the survivor.

survivor.description: Name of the entity to keep after the merge

loser.description: Name of the entity to fold into the survivor
